prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SPACEBATTLE-DINOGUN-KPKO Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Morphing Dinosaur 3 in 1 Toy Space Blaster with Lights Sounds, Red, Boys Ages 3+ Description: This awesome dinosaur toys morphing 3 in 1 space blaster toy allows kids to transform between a standard space blaster and a dinosaur space blaster. And, not only will play time be enhanced with the blaster's spectacular lights and wild sounds, it will encourage little space rangers to develop their fine motor and problem solving skills too, as they morph between futuristic space and dinosaur battle blaster.

Whether battling aliens or intergalactic villains (after dinner and homework of course), play time just got way more rad with this 2 in 1 toy blasters amazing lights and sounds; featuring vibrant lights that ignite with the pull of the trigger, the space blaster also has loud sounds alongside the lights, making for some serious space battle pretend play action.

Encouraging social play and educational development, this space blaster toys for boys will have imaginations blasting into overdrive. The fun lights and sounds make play time even more realistic as kids use their imagination to come up with lots of space travel pretend play story lines. And, while this 3 in 1 space blaster makes pretend play and cosplay super fun with all its engaging features, it also encourages kids to develop their problem solving, fine motor and dexterity skills as they morph between T Rex dinosaur space blaster toy to regular space blaster toy; DIY tools included with purchase.

Expand your child's imaginations and creativity with the Kidplokio 2 in 1 Transforming Dinosaur Toys Space Blaster in vibrant red colorway. With its innovative and easy morphing capability, your little one will be kept busy for hours rebuilding between a fearsome T Rex dinosaur and a futuristic space blaster.

Made of durable, high quality, nontoxic plastic, this morphing dinosaur toys space is safe for both indoor and outdoor play.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: christmas gifts toddler toys hand eye coordination training fine motor toys for toddlers toys for boys kids pretend play indoor playset christmas presents for kids Features: - AWESOME DINOSAUR TOYS SPACE BLASTER: This 3 in 1 space blaster toy allows kids to morph between standard space blaster and dinosaur space blaster! Not only will play time be enhanced with the blaster's spectacular lights and wild sounds, it will encourage kids to develop their fine motor and problem solving skills too - OUT OF THIS WORLD LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Whether battling aliens or intergalactic villains, play time just got way more rad with this toy blasters amazing lights and sounds; featuring vibrant lights that ignite with the pull of the trigger, the space blaster also has sounds alongside the lights for some serious space battle pretend play action! - DIY LEARNING TOYS: While this 3 in 1 space blaster makes pretend play and cosplay super fun with all its engaging features, it also encourages kids to develop their problem solving, fine motor and dexterity skills as they morph between t rex dinosaur space blaster toy to regular space blaster toy; DIY tools included with purchase - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Encouraging social play and educational development, this space blaster toys for boys will have imaginations blasting into overdrive! The fun lights and sounds make play time even more realistic as kids use their imagination to come up with lots of space travel pretend play story lines - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 17 x 10 x 4 inches; Weight: 2lbs; Color: Red; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Note: Batteries not included; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
